sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Operational review for environments, services, deploy pipelines, recovery, and system plumbing.

sections.title: Responsibilities
sections.summary: - environment discipline - deploy plumbing - background services - indexers - relayers - telemetry pipelines - rollback and recovery - secrets and config hygiene

sections.title: Key Question
sections.summary: What can break in operation, and how fast can we recover when it does?
